id.description: The unique identifier of the email.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the email was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the email was last updated.

url.description: The URL associated with the email.

subject.description: The subject line of the email.

fromName.description: The sender name displayed in the email.

type.description: The type of from name (e.g., Text).

value.description: The value of the from name.

type.description: The type of from email (e.g., Text).

value.description: The value of the from email.

type.description: The type of reply email (e.g., Text).

value.description: The value of the reply email.

folder.description: Details about the folder containing the email.

value.description: The unique identifier of the folder.

operational.description: Whether the email is operational (bypasses unsubscribe).

publishToMSI.description: Whether the email is published to Marketo Sales Insight.

webView.description: Whether the email has web view enabled.

status.description: The current status of the email (e.g., approved, draft).

template.description: The ID of the template used for the email.

workspace.description: The workspace the email belongs to.

isOpenTrackingDisabled.description: Whether open tracking is disabled for this email.

version.description: The version number of the email.

autoCopyToText.description: Whether the HTML content is automatically copied to the text version.

ccFields.description: List of CC fields for the email.

attributeId.description: The attribute ID of the CC field.

objectName.description: The object name of the CC field.

displayName.description: The display name of the CC field.

apiName.description: The API name of the CC field.

preHeader.description: The preheader text of the email.
